problem_statement: NetBird's management server ships with an embedded identity provider based on Dex that supports local-user authentication via email and password. When an administrator enables the embedded IDP, there is no way to require multi-factor authentication for those local accounts, so users authenticate with a password alone. The Settings type in management/server/types/settings.go lacks a LocalMfaEnabled flag; the embedded IDP manager in management/server/idp/embedded.go does not configure MFA on the Dex provider; and the public account settings HTTP API does not expose an MFA toggle. The Dex provider configuration (idp/dex/config.go, idp/dex/provider.go) needs to support TOTP (and the underlying WebAuthn authenticator type) wired through configurable session settings — including a session cookie encryption key with a validated length, a resolved default when none is configured, and sanitised post-logout redirect URIs. Add server-side support so that the management server can toggle MFA for local users via a new LocalMfaEnabled account setting that, when enabled, configures the embedded Dex provider to require TOTP for all local user logins. The change must persist the setting through GORM in management/server/store/sql_store.go, propagate it through DefaultAccountManager (management/server/account.go) when settings are updated, expose it via the AccountSettings API (shared/management/http/api/openapi.yml and types.gen.go), and surface activity codes for enable/disable transitions (management/server/activity/codes.go). The Dex side must add MFA configuration parsing, build TOTP/WebAuthn providers from YAML, configure sessions with a resolved cookie encryption key, sanitise post-logout redirect URIs, and load HTML templates for the TOTP/WebAuthn verification flows under idp/dex/web/templates/. Tests should verify that the embedded IdP YAML configuration emits the resolved session cookie encryption key, that resolveSessionCookieEncryptionKey honours a configured key versus generating a default, and that the Dex logout handler redirects correctly when no ID token hint is present.
problem_statement_variant: The embedded local-auth identity provider shipped with the management server lets users sign in with username and password but cannot require an additional verification factor. Extend the server so an administrator can enable a second factor for locally-authenticated accounts. The toggle should live on the account settings, persist across restarts, propagate through the embedded provider so subsequent logins are challenged, and be reported in activity events. Wire up TOTP support end-to-end including the relevant configuration objects, a resolved session secret used to encrypt verification cookies, sanitised post-logout redirects, and the HTML pages presented during verification. Make sure existing settings flows continue to work — the new flag must round-trip through the public API and the database — and the embedded provider must safely fall back when no MFA configuration is supplied. Cover the new behaviour with tests that pin the YAML configuration output, the secret-resolution helper, and the logout redirect path.
hints: Touched files: combined/cmd/config.go, combined/config.yaml.example, idp/dex/config.go, idp/dex/provider.go, idp/dex/web/templates/{home,logout,password,totp_verify,webauthn_verify}.html, management/internals/server/modules.go, management/server/account.go, management/server/activity/codes.go, management/server/http/handlers/accounts/accounts_handler.go, management/server/idp/embedded.go, management/server/store/sql_store.go, management/server/types/settings.go, shared/management/http/api/openapi.yml, shared/management/http/api/types.gen.go. Key new symbols: Settings.LocalMfaEnabled, EmbeddedIdPManager.SetMFAEnabled, EmbeddedIdPManager.IsMFAEnabled, DefaultAccountManager.handleLocalMfaSettings, isMFAEnabledForAccount, configureMFA, resolveSessionCookieEncryptionKey, validSessionCookieEncryptionKeyLength, buildTotpConfig, buildWebAuthnConfig, buildSessionsConfig, sanitizePostLogoutRedirectURIs, getSigner, Provider.SetClientsMFAChain. Dex YAML config types added: Sessions, MFAConfig, MFAAuthenticator, TOTPConfig, WebAuthnConfig. New activity codes signal local MFA enable/disable transitions. Session cookie encryption key must be 16, 24, or 32 bytes when configured.
